sentences.cn: 这双手套有点大，戴着不方便。
sentences.en: These gloves are a bit big and awkward to wear.

sentences.cn: 她用水桶装了半桶水。
sentences.en: She filled the bucket halfway with water.

sentences.cn: 水桶太重了，我一个人提不动。
sentences.en: The bucket is too heavy, so I can't carry it by myself.

sentences.cn: 碗上有油，多放点洗洁精。
sentences.en: There is grease on the bowls, so add a little more dish soap.

sentences.cn: 洗洁精可以把油洗得很干净。
sentences.en: Dish soap can wash grease away very cleanly.

sentences.cn: 天冷了，晚上要多盖一床被子。
sentences.en: It's cold now, so cover yourself with an extra quilt at night.

sentences.cn: 早上起来我把被子叠得整整齐齐。
sentences.en: When I got up in the morning, I folded the quilt neatly.

sentences.cn: 这个枕头太高了，我睡得脖子疼。
sentences.en: This pillow is too high, and my neck hurts when I sleep on it.

sentences.cn: 他喜欢抱着枕头睡觉。
sentences.en: He likes to sleep hugging a pillow.

sentences.cn: 妈妈每周换一次床单。
sentences.en: Mom changes the bedsheet once a week.

sentences.cn: 这条床单是白色的，很容易脏。
sentences.en: This bedsheet is white and gets dirty easily.

sentences.cn: 看电视的时候，她盖着一条毛毯。
sentences.en: While watching TV, she has a blanket over her.

sentences.cn: 冬天坐车时，毛毯可以盖在腿上。
sentences.en: Keeping a blanket in the car is very useful in winter.

sentences.cn: 枕套脏了，我拿下来洗。
sentences.en: The pillowcase is dirty, so I took it off to wash.

sentences.cn: 这个枕套的颜色和床单一样。
sentences.en: This pillowcase is the same color as the bedsheet.

sentences.cn: 新买的床垫睡起来很舒服。
sentences.en: The newly bought mattress is very comfortable to sleep on.

sentences.cn: 这张床垫太软了，对腰不好。
sentences.en: This mattress is too soft and bad for your back.

sentences.cn: 换季的时候要洗一洗被套。
sentences.en: When the seasons change, you should wash the duvet cover.

sentences.cn: 这个被套上印着蓝色的花。
sentences.en: This duvet cover has blue flowers printed on it.

sentences.cn: 夏天睡觉前，记得放下蚊帐。
sentences.en: Before sleeping in summer, remember to lower the mosquito net.

sentences.cn: 有了蚊帐，晚上就不怕蚊子了。
sentences.en: With a mosquito net, you don't have to worry about mosquitoes at night.

sentences.cn: 沙发上放了两个软软的靠垫。
sentences.en: There are two soft cushions on the sofa.

sentences.cn: 累的时候，她靠着靠垫休息。
sentences.en: When she is tired, she leans against the cushion to rest.

sentences.cn: 去山里露营，我们带了睡袋。
sentences.en: We brought sleeping bags to camp in the mountains.

sentences.cn: 这个睡袋很暖和，也很轻。
sentences.en: This sleeping bag is very warm and also very light.

sentences.cn: 我的卧室很小，只放得下一张床。
sentences.en: My bedroom is small; it only fits one bed.

sentences.cn: 累了一天，他回到卧室就睡了。
sentences.en: After a tiring day, he went back to the bedroom and fell asleep.

sentences.cn: 晚上一家人常在客厅看电视。
sentences.en: In the evening the whole family often watches TV in the living room.

sentences.cn: 客厅的沙发前有一张大桌子。
sentences.en: There is a big table in front of the sofa in the living room.

sentences.cn: 妈妈在厨房做饭，我去帮忙。
sentences.en: Mom is cooking in the kitchen, so I go to help.

sentences.cn: 厨房里有点热，我们把窗户打开。
sentences.en: It's a bit hot in the kitchen, so we open the window.

sentences.cn: 请问，卫生间在哪儿？
sentences.en: Excuse me, where is the bathroom?

sentences.cn: 卫生间的灯坏了，得修一下。
sentences.en: The bathroom light is broken and needs fixing.

sentences.cn: 爸爸在书房里工作，别去吵他。
sentences.en: Dad is working in the study, so don't disturb him.

sentences.cn: 书房里有很多书和一台电脑。
sentences.en: There are many books and a computer in the study.

sentences.cn: 客人来了，我们在餐厅吃饭。
sentences.en: When guests come, we eat in the dining room.

sentences.cn: 餐厅的墙上挂着一幅画。
sentences.en: A painting hangs on the wall of the dining room.

sentences.cn: 奶奶喜欢在阳台上种花。
sentences.en: Grandma likes to grow flowers on the balcony.

sentences.cn: 天气好的时候，我在阳台上晒衣服。
sentences.en: When the weather is nice, I dry clothes on the balcony.

sentences.cn: 他把车停进车库里。
sentences.en: He parks the car inside the garage.

sentences.cn: 车库里除了车，还放着很多旧东西。
sentences.en: Besides the car, the garage also holds a lot of old things.

sentences.cn: 用不到的东西都放在储藏室。
sentences.en: Things we don't use are all kept in the storage room.

sentences.cn: 储藏室太乱了，我们周末整理一下。
sentences.en: The storage room is too messy, so let's tidy it up this weekend.

sentences.cn: 这栋楼的地下室是停车的地方。
sentences.en: The basement of this building is where people park.

sentences.cn: 地下室有点潮，别放书在那里。
sentences.en: The basement is a bit damp, so don't keep books there.

sentences.cn: 天冷的时候，我们喜欢去火锅店。
sentences.en: When it's cold, we like to go to a hot pot restaurant.

sentences.cn: 这家火锅店周末人很多，要排队。
sentences.en: This hot pot restaurant is crowded on weekends, and you have to wait in line.

sentences.cn: 中午没时间，我在快餐店随便吃了点。
sentences.en: I had no time at noon, so I grabbed a quick bite at a fast food shop.

sentences.cn: 车站旁边有一家快餐店。
sentences.en: There is a fast food shop next to the station.

sentences.cn: 晚上他们去烧烤店喝啤酒。
sentences.en: In the evening they went to a BBQ joint to drink beer.

sentences.cn: 这家烧烤店的羊肉串很有名。
sentences.en: The lamb skewers at this BBQ joint are famous.

sentences.cn: 楼下的面馆一碗面才十块钱。
sentences.en: A bowl of noodles at the noodle shop downstairs is only ten yuan.

sentences.cn: 我常去那家面馆吃牛肉面。
sentences.en: I often go to that noodle shop to eat beef noodles.

sentences.cn: 他们在西餐厅点了牛排和汤。
sentences.en: They ordered steak and soup at the Western restaurant.

sentences.cn: 这家西餐厅晚上要先订位子。
sentences.en: At this Western restaurant you have to book a table ahead for the evening.

sentences.cn: 周末我喜欢在咖啡馆看书。
sentences.en: On weekends I like to read at a café.

sentences.cn: 这家咖啡馆的蛋糕很好吃。
sentences.en: The cakes at this café are delicious.

sentences.cn: 老人们常在茶馆里聊天下棋。
sentences.en: Old folks often chat and play chess in the teahouse.

sentences.cn: 这家茶馆很安静，很适合谈事情。
sentences.en: This teahouse is quiet and good for discussing things.

sentences.cn: 这家酒店的自助餐种类很多。
sentences.en: This hotel's buffet has a wide variety of food.

sentences.cn: 吃自助餐的时候，别拿太多吃不完。
sentences.en: When you eat at a buffet, don't take more than you can finish.

sentences.cn: 学生们中午都在食堂吃饭。
sentences.en: The students all eat lunch in the canteen.

sentences.cn: 公司食堂的饭又便宜又干净。
sentences.en: The company canteen's food is cheap and clean.

sentences.cn: 这条街上有很多小吃店。
sentences.en: There are many snack shops on this street.

sentences.cn: 放学后，孩子们爱去小吃店买东西吃。
sentences.en: After school, the kids love to buy something to eat at the snack shop.

sentences.cn: 下班后我去超市买了些菜。
sentences.en: After work I went to the supermarket to buy some vegetables.

sentences.cn: 这家超市晚上十点才关门。
sentences.en: This supermarket doesn't close until ten at night.

sentences.cn: 周末他常去书店看书。
sentences.en: On weekends he often goes to the bookstore to read.

sentences.cn: 这家书店里也卖笔和本子。
sentences.en: This bookstore also sells pens and notebooks.

sentences.cn: 我头疼，去药店买了点药。
sentences.en: My head hurts, so I went to the pharmacy to buy some medicine.

sentences.cn: 药店就在医院对面。
sentences.en: The pharmacy is right across from the hospital.

sentences.cn: 她在花店买了一束玫瑰。
sentences.en: She bought a bunch of roses at the flower shop.

sentences.cn: 母亲节那天，花店的生意特别好。
sentences.en: On Mother's Day, the flower shop's business is especially good.

sentences.cn: 早上面包店里有刚出炉的面包。
sentences.en: In the morning the bakery has fresh bread straight out of the oven.

sentences.cn: 路过面包店，我闻到了香味。
sentences.en: Passing the bakery, I caught a nice smell.

sentences.cn: 这家服装店的衣服有点贵。
sentences.en: The clothes at this clothing store are a bit expensive.

sentences.cn: 她在服装店试了三件衣服。
sentences.en: She tried on three outfits at the clothing store.

sentences.cn: 我在鞋店买了一双跑步鞋。
sentences.en: I bought a pair of running shoes at the shoe store.

sentences.cn: 这家鞋店的鞋子在打折。
sentences.en: The shoes at this shoe store are on sale.

sentences.cn: 半夜想喝水，我去楼下的便利店买。
sentences.en: When I wanted water in the middle of the night, I went to the convenience store downstairs.

sentences.cn: 便利店里可以交电费。
sentences.en: You can pay your electricity bill at the convenience store.

sentences.cn: 水果店门口摆着新鲜的西瓜。
sentences.en: Fresh watermelons are set out at the entrance of the fruit shop.

sentences.cn: 这家水果店的苹果又甜又便宜。
sentences.en: The apples at this fruit shop are sweet and cheap.

sentences.cn: 孩子一进玩具店就不想走了。
sentences.en: As soon as the child walks into the toy store, he doesn't want to leave.

sentences.cn: 我在玩具店给侄子买了个礼物。
sentences.en: I bought my nephew a gift at the toy store.

sentences.cn: 我家离学校很近，走路十分钟。
sentences.en: My home is close to the school, ten minutes on foot.

sentences.cn: 学校旁边有一个大操场。
sentences.en: There is a big playground next to the school.

sentences.cn: 奶奶生病了，我们送她去医院。
sentences.en: Grandma got sick, so we took her to the hospital.

sentences.cn: 这家医院很大，看病的人也多。
sentences.en: This hospital is big, and there are a lot of patients.

sentences.cn: 我去银行取了一些钱。
sentences.en: I went to the bank to take out some money.

sentences.cn: 银行下午五点关门。
sentences.en: The bank closes at five in the afternoon.

sentences.cn: 考试前，学生们都去图书馆看书。
sentences.en: Before exams, the students all go to the library to study.

sentences.cn: 图书馆里要保持安静。
sentences.en: You have to stay quiet in the library.

sentences.cn: 这个博物馆里有很多老照片。
sentences.en: This museum has many old photos.

sentences.cn: 周一博物馆不开门。
sentences.en: The museum is closed on Mondays.

sentences.cn: 这座教堂已经有一百多年了。
sentences.en: This church is already more than a hundred years old.

sentences.cn: 星期天很多人去教堂。
sentences.en: On Sundays a lot of people go to the church.

sentences.cn: 今晚体育馆里有一场篮球比赛。
sentences.en: There is a basketball game at the arena tonight.

sentences.cn: 学生们在体育馆里上体育课。
sentences.en: The students have PE class in the gym.

sentences.cn: 飞机晚点了，我们在机场等了两个小时。
sentences.en: The flight was delayed, and we waited at the airport for two hours.

sentences.cn: 从这里坐地铁可以直接到机场。
sentences.en: You can take the subway straight to the airport from here.

sentences.cn: 周末商场里到处都是人。
sentences.en: On weekends the mall is packed with people everywhere.

sentences.cn: 下雨了，我们去商场里逛逛吧。
sentences.en: It's raining, so let's go walk around in the mall.

sentences.cn: 我们在海边订了一家酒店。
sentences.en: We booked a hotel by the sea.

sentences.cn: 这家酒店的房间又大又干净。
sentences.en: The rooms at this hotel are big and clean.

sentences.cn: 每天早上很多老人在公园里锻炼。
sentences.en: Every morning many elderly people exercise in the park.

sentences.cn: 我们带孩子去公园放风筝。
sentences.en: We take the kids to the park to fly a kite.

sentences.cn: 我在车站等了半天，车才来。
sentences.en: I waited a long time at the station before the bus came.

sentences.cn: 车站前面人很多，小心别丢东西。
sentences.en: There are lots of people in front of the station, so be careful not to lose your things.

sentences.cn: 晚上很多人在广场上跳舞。
sentences.en: In the evening many people dance in the square.

sentences.cn: 广场中间有一个大喷泉。
sentences.en: There is a big fountain in the middle of the square.

sentences.cn: 周五晚上我们去电影院看电影。
sentences.en: On Friday night we go to the cinema to watch a movie.

sentences.cn: 电影院里不能大声说话。
sentences.en: You can't talk loudly in the cinema.

sentences.cn: 他半夜肚子疼，只好去医院。
sentences.en: His stomach hurt in the middle of the night, so he had to go to the hospital.

sentences.cn: 去医院看病，记得带上身份证。
sentences.en: When you go to the hospital, remember to bring your ID card.

sentences.cn: 银行里排队的人很多，我等了很久。
sentences.en: There were many people lined up at the bank, and I waited a long time.

sentences.cn: 你可以在银行门口的机器上取钱。
sentences.en: You can withdraw money from the machine at the bank's entrance.

sentences.cn: 我去邮局寄了一个包裹给妈妈。
sentences.en: I went to the post office to mail a package to my mom.

sentences.cn: 邮局中午休息一个小时。
sentences.en: The post office closes for an hour at noon.

sentences.cn: 请问，这附近有公共厕所吗？
sentences.en: Excuse me, is there a public restroom nearby?

sentences.cn: 商场的厕所在二楼。
sentences.en: The mall's restroom is on the second floor.

sentences.cn: 孩子们最喜欢去动物园看大熊猫。
sentences.en: The children love going to the zoo to see the pandas most of all.

sentences.cn: 动物园的门票不太贵。
sentences.en: The zoo tickets are not too expensive.

sentences.cn: 夏天我每周去游泳馆游两次。
sentences.en: In summer I go to the swimming pool to swim twice a week.

sentences.cn: 进游泳馆要先戴上泳帽。
sentences.en: You have to put on a swim cap before entering the swimming pool.

sentences.cn: 过马路要看红绿灯。
sentences.en: You have to watch the traffic light when you cross the street.

sentences.cn: 前面的红绿灯坏了，车都停下来了。
sentences.en: The traffic light ahead is broken, so all the cars stopped.

sentences.cn: 公交车站就在那家超市门口。
sentences.en: The bus stop is right at the entrance of that supermarket.

sentences.cn: 我在公交车站等了十分钟的车。
sentences.en: I waited ten minutes for the bus at the bus stop.

sentences.cn: 最近的地铁站离这里不远。
sentences.en: The nearest subway station is not far from here.

sentences.cn: 早上地铁站里人特别多。
sentences.en: In the morning the subway station is especially crowded.

sentences.cn: 天黑了，路灯都亮了。
sentences.en: It got dark, and all the streetlights came on.

sentences.cn: 这条街的路灯坏了几个，晚上有点黑。
sentences.en: Several streetlights on this street are broken, so it's a bit dark at night.

sentences.cn: 走路请走人行道，别走到马路上。
sentences.en: Please walk on the sidewalk, not out into the road.

sentences.cn: 人行道上停了很多自行车。
sentences.en: Many bicycles are parked on the sidewalk.

sentences.cn: 想去马路对面，可以走天桥。
sentences.en: If you want to reach the other side of the road, you can take the overpass.

sentences.cn: 老人上天桥有点累，那里有电梯。
sentences.en: Climbing the overpass is a bit tiring for older people, so there is an elevator there.

sentences.cn: 请把空瓶子扔进那个垃圾桶。
sentences.en: Please throw the empty bottle into that trash bin.

sentences.cn: 公园里每隔几步就有一个垃圾桶。
sentences.en: In the park there is a trash bin every few steps.

sentences.cn: 商场下面有一个很大的停车场。
sentences.en: There is a big parking lot beneath the mall.

sentences.cn: 停车场满了，我们只好停到路边。
sentences.en: The parking lot was full, so we had to park at the roadside.

sentences.cn: 车快没油了，前面有个加油站。
sentences.en: The car is almost out of gas, and there is a gas station ahead.

sentences.cn: 高速路上的加油站开二十四小时。
sentences.en: The gas station on the highway is open twenty-four hours.

sentences.cn: 晚上广场的喷泉会随着音乐跳舞。
sentences.en: At night the fountain in the square dances to the music.

sentences.cn: 孩子们喜欢站在喷泉旁边看水。
sentences.en: The children like to stand by the fountain and watch the water.

sentences.cn: 我在城里租了一个小公寓。
sentences.en: I rented a small apartment in the city.

sentences.cn: 我们的公寓在三楼，坐电梯上去很方便。
sentences.en: Our apartment is on the third floor, so taking the elevator up is easy.

sentences.cn: 他家的别墅有一个很大的花园。
sentences.en: His family's villa has a big garden.

sentences.cn: 这栋别墅靠近海边，夏天很凉快。
sentences.en: This villa is near the sea and stays cool in summer.

sentences.cn: 爷爷奶奶住在乡下的平房里。
sentences.en: My grandparents live in a bungalow in the countryside.

sentences.cn: 平房没有楼梯，老人走路更安全。
sentences.en: A bungalow has no stairs, so it is safer for older people to move around.

sentences.cn: 这片新楼房一共有二十层。
sentences.en: This new apartment block has twenty floors in total.

sentences.cn: 我搬进楼房以后，冬天暖和多了。
sentences.en: After I moved into the apartment block, winters felt much warmer.

sentences.cn: 北京的四合院中间有一个院子。
sentences.en: A courtyard house in Beijing has a yard in the middle.

sentences.cn: 周末我们去参观了一座老四合院。
sentences.en: On the weekend we visited an old courtyard house.

sentences.cn: 山上有一间小木屋，可以住一晚。
sentences.en: There is a small cabin on the mountain where you can stay one night.

sentences.cn: 木屋是用木头盖的，闻起来很香。
sentences.en: The cabin is built of wood and smells nice.

sentences.cn: 我们在河边搭了一个帐篷。
sentences.en: We put up a tent by the river.

sentences.cn: 晚上下雨了，帐篷里还是很干。
sentences.en: It rained at night, but the inside of the tent stayed dry.

sentences.cn: 这座古老的城堡有几百年的历史。
sentences.en: This ancient castle is several hundred years old.

sentences.cn: 孩子们喜欢用积木搭城堡。
sentences.en: The children like to build a castle out of blocks.

sentences.cn: 农舍旁边养着几只鸡。
sentences.en: A few chickens are kept beside the farmhouse.

sentences.cn: 我们在农舍里吃了新鲜的蔬菜。
sentences.en: We ate fresh vegetables in the farmhouse.

sentences.cn: 这间茅屋的屋顶是用草做的。
sentences.en: The roof of this thatched hut is made of straw.

sentences.cn: 很久以前，穷人住在茅屋里。
sentences.en: Long ago, poor people lived in thatched huts.

sentences.cn: 爸爸开汽车送我去上学。
sentences.en: My dad drives me to school by car.

sentences.cn: 这辆汽车太旧了，常常出问题。
sentences.en: This car is too old and often breaks down.

sentences.cn: 我每天坐公交车去上班。
sentences.en: I take the bus to work every day.

sentences.cn: 公交车来了，我们快上车吧。
sentences.en: The bus is here, so let's get on quickly.

sentences.cn: 周末我喜欢骑自行车去公园。
sentences.en: On weekends I like to ride my bicycle to the park.

sentences.cn: 我的自行车坏了，得去修一下。
sentences.en: My bicycle is broken, so I need to get it fixed.

sentences.cn: 我们坐火车回老家过节。
sentences.en: We take the train back to our hometown for the holiday.

sentences.cn: 火车快要开了，请大家上车。
sentences.en: The train is about to leave, so please get on board.

sentences.cn: 坐地铁比开车快，也不堵车。
sentences.en: Taking the subway is faster than driving and avoids traffic jams.

sentences.cn: 地铁站离我家只有五分钟。
sentences.en: The subway station is only five minutes from my home.

sentences.cn: 我第一次坐飞机去北京。
sentences.en: I flew to Beijing by airplane for the first time.

sentences.cn: 飞机就要起飞了，请系好安全带。
sentences.en: The airplane is about to take off, so please fasten your seatbelt.

sentences.cn: 下雨天很难打到出租车。
sentences.en: It is hard to catch a taxi on rainy days.

sentences.cn: 我坐出租车去机场，大概要半个小时。
sentences.en: I take a taxi to the airport, and it takes about half an hour.

sentences.cn: 他骑摩托车上班，又快又方便。
sentences.en: He rides a motorcycle to work, which is fast and convenient.

sentences.cn: 骑摩托车一定要戴头盔。
sentences.en: You must wear a helmet when riding a motorcycle.

sentences.cn: 我们坐船去河对面的小岛。
sentences.en: We take a boat to the small island across the river.

sentences.cn: 湖上有一条小船慢慢地开着。
sentences.en: A small boat moves slowly across the lake.

sentences.cn: 那辆大卡车上装满了水果。
sentences.en: That big truck is loaded with fruit.

sentences.cn: 卡车太大了，不能开进这条小路。
sentences.en: The truck is too big to drive into this narrow street.

sentences.cn: 红灯的时候，所有的车都要停。
sentences.en: When the light is red, all cars must stop.

sentences.cn: 警察让我们在路口停一下。
sentences.en: The police officer asked us to stop at the intersection.

sentences.cn: 过马路以前要看红绿灯。
sentences.en: Look at the traffic light before crossing the road.

sentences.cn: 红绿灯坏了，路口有点乱。
sentences.en: The traffic light is broken, so the intersection is a bit chaotic.

sentences.cn: 请走人行道，不要在马路中间走。
sentences.en: Please use the crosswalk and don't walk in the middle of the road.

sentences.cn: 孩子们在人行道上等着过马路。
sentences.en: The children wait at the crosswalk to cross the road.

sentences.cn: 这条路在修，前面禁止通行。
sentences.en: This road is under repair, and there is no entry ahead.

sentences.cn: 看到禁止通行的牌子，我们只好绕路。
sentences.en: When we saw the no-entry sign, we had to take a detour.

sentences.cn: 学校门口限速，开车要慢一点。
sentences.en: There is a speed limit near the school, so drive a little slower.

sentences.cn: 高速公路上的限速是每小时一百二十公里。
sentences.en: The speed limit on the highway is 120 kilometers per hour.

sentences.cn: 这是单行道，不能倒车回去。
sentences.en: This is a one-way street, so you can't back up.

sentences.cn: 走错了单行道，只能往前开。
sentences.en: If you take a one-way road the wrong way, you can only keep driving forward.

sentences.cn: 前面路口向右转弯。
sentences.en: Turn right at the intersection ahead.

sentences.cn: 转弯的时候要先打灯。
sentences.en: Signal first before you turn.

sentences.cn: 医院门口禁止停车。
sentences.en: There is no parking in front of the hospital.

sentences.cn: 这里禁止停车，我们去找停车场吧。
sentences.en: Parking isn't allowed here, so let's go find a parking lot.

sentences.cn: 开车经过学校要注意行人。
sentences.en: Watch for pedestrians when you drive past a school.

sentences.cn: 这个路口人很多，请注意行人。
sentences.en: There are many people at this intersection, so watch for pedestrians.

sentences.cn: 到了路口一直直行就到了。
sentences.en: Go straight at the intersection and you'll be there.

sentences.cn: 这条路只能直行，不能左转。
sentences.en: On this road you can only go straight, not turn left.

sentences.cn: 我们坐船去看海上的日出。
sentences.en: We take a boat out to watch the sunrise over the sea.

sentences.cn: 那条船上坐满了游客。
sentences.en: That boat is full of tourists.

sentences.cn: 这艘大轮船可以载几千人。
sentences.en: This large ship can carry several thousand people.

sentences.cn: 轮船慢慢开出了港口。
sentences.en: The ship slowly sailed out of the harbor.

sentences.cn: 有钱人喜欢开游艇出海。
sentences.en: Wealthy people like to take a yacht out to sea.

sentences.cn: 这艘白色的游艇又漂亮又干净。
sentences.en: This white yacht is beautiful and clean.

sentences.cn: 帆船靠风才能往前走。
sentences.en: A sailboat needs wind to move forward.

sentences.cn: 湖上有很多白色的帆船。
sentences.en: There are many white sailboats on the lake.

sentences.cn: 我们坐渡船过江去对岸。
sentences.en: We take the ferry across the river to the other side.

sentences.cn: 渡船每半个小时开一班。
sentences.en: The ferry leaves every half hour.

sentences.cn: 一叶小舟在河上慢慢划着。
sentences.en: A small boat drifts slowly down the river.

sentences.cn: 渔民划着小舟去捕鱼。
sentences.en: The fisherman rows a small boat out to catch fish.

sentences.cn: 潜水艇可以在海底下航行。
sentences.en: A submarine can travel deep under the sea.

sentences.cn: 我在电影里看过巨大的潜水艇。
sentences.en: I saw a huge submarine in a movie.

sentences.cn: 端午节我们去看划龙舟。
sentences.en: We go to watch the dragon boat races during the Dragon Boat Festival.

sentences.cn: 龙舟上的队员一起用力划。
sentences.en: The team members on the dragon boat paddle hard together.

sentences.cn: 他们用几根木头做了一个木筏。
sentences.en: They made a raft out of a few logs.

sentences.cn: 坐木筏顺着河水往下漂很好玩。
sentences.en: Floating downriver on a raft is a lot of fun.

sentences.cn: 快艇开得很快，溅起了很多水花。
sentences.en: The speedboat goes very fast and splashes up a lot of water.

sentences.cn: 我们坐快艇十分钟就到了小岛。
sentences.en: We reached the island in ten minutes by speedboat.

sentences.cn: 坐飞机去上海只要两个小时。
sentences.en: It takes only two hours to fly to Shanghai by airplane.

sentences.cn: 飞机在云上面飞得很平稳。
sentences.en: The airplane flies smoothly above the clouds.

sentences.cn: 直升机可以停在楼顶上。
sentences.en: A helicopter can land on the roof of a building.

sentences.cn: 救援队用直升机把病人送到医院。
sentences.en: The rescue team took the patient to the hospital by helicopter.

sentences.cn: 我们坐热气球看到了整个山谷。
sentences.en: We saw the whole valley from the hot air balloon.

sentences.cn: 热气球慢慢升到了天空中。
sentences.en: The hot air balloon slowly rose into the sky.

sentences.cn: 火箭把卫星送上了太空。
sentences.en: The rocket sent a satellite into space.

sentences.cn: 很多人来看火箭发射。
sentences.en: Many people came to watch the rocket launch.

sentences.cn: 滑翔机没有发动机，靠风飞行。
sentences.en: A glider has no engine and flies on the wind.

sentences.cn: 他开着滑翔机在山上空飞。
sentences.en: He flew a glider over the mountains.

sentences.cn: 天上飘着一艘大飞船。
sentences.en: A large airship floats in the sky.

sentences.cn: 这艘飞船里面可以坐很多人。
sentences.en: This airship can seat many people inside.

sentences.cn: 他用无人机拍下了美丽的风景。
sentences.en: He used a drone to film the beautiful scenery.

sentences.cn: 无人机可以飞到很高的地方。
sentences.en: A drone can fly to very high places.

sentences.cn: 跳伞的时候要打开降落伞。
sentences.en: You open the parachute when you jump from the plane.

sentences.cn: 降落伞让他慢慢地落到地上。
sentences.en: The parachute let him land on the ground slowly.

sentences.cn: 这架客机可以坐三百多人。
sentences.en: This passenger jet can hold over three hundred people.

sentences.cn: 客机准时降落在机场。
sentences.en: The passenger jet landed at the airport on time.

sentences.cn: 战斗机飞得又快又高。
sentences.en: The fighter jet flies fast and high.

sentences.cn: 我们在展览上看到了一架战斗机。
sentences.en: We saw a fighter jet at the exhibition.

sentences.cn: 放学后我们去操场打篮球。
sentences.en: After school we go to the playground to play basketball.

sentences.cn: 他个子高，打篮球很有优势。
sentences.en: He is tall, which is an advantage in basketball.

sentences.cn: 周末我和朋友一起踢足球。
sentences.en: On weekends I play soccer with my friends.

sentences.cn: 那场足球比赛我们队赢了。
sentences.en: Our team won that soccer match.

sentences.cn: 中国人很喜欢打乒乓球。
sentences.en: Chinese people love to play table tennis.

sentences.cn: 打乒乓球需要一张球桌和球拍。
sentences.en: You need a table and paddles to play table tennis.

sentences.cn: 她每周去俱乐部打两次网球。
sentences.en: She plays tennis at the club twice a week.

sentences.cn: 打网球要用球拍把球打过网。
sentences.en: In tennis you hit the ball over the net with a racket.

sentences.cn: 我们在沙滩上打排球。
sentences.en: We play volleyball on the beach.

sentences.cn: 打排球的时候，队员要互相配合。
sentences.en: In volleyball, teammates have to work together.

sentences.cn: 我和弟弟在院子里打羽毛球。
sentences.en: My younger brother and I play badminton in the yard.

sentences.cn: 刮大风的时候不适合打羽毛球。
sentences.en: A strong wind is not good for playing badminton.

sentences.cn: 在美国，棒球是很受欢迎的运动。
sentences.en: In the United States, baseball is a very popular sport.

sentences.cn: 他用力一挥，把棒球打得很远。
sentences.en: He swung hard and hit the baseball far.

sentences.cn: 打高尔夫需要很大的草地。
sentences.en: Playing golf needs a large area of grass.

sentences.cn: 爷爷退休以后开始学打高尔夫。
sentences.en: After Grandpa retired, he started learning to play golf.

sentences.cn: 橄榄球是一种很激烈的运动。
sentences.en: Rugby is a very intense sport.

sentences.cn: 打橄榄球的人身体都很强壮。
sentences.en: People who play rugby are all very strong.

sentences.cn: 晚上我们去酒吧打台球。
sentences.en: In the evening we go to the bar to play billiards.

sentences.cn: 打台球要用球杆把球打进洞里。
sentences.en: In billiards you use a cue to knock the balls into the pockets.

sentences.cn: 周末我们一起去爬山。
sentences.en: On the weekend we go hiking together.

sentences.cn: 爬山的时候要穿舒服的鞋子。
sentences.en: You should wear comfortable shoes when hiking.

sentences.cn: 夏天我们喜欢去湖边露营。
sentences.en: In summer we like to go camping by the lake.

sentences.cn: 露营的时候，晚上可以看到很多星星。
sentences.en: When camping, you can see many stars at night.

sentences.cn: 爷爷常常一个人去河边钓鱼。
sentences.en: Grandpa often goes fishing alone by the river.

sentences.cn: 钓鱼需要很多耐心。
sentences.en: Fishing takes a lot of patience.

sentences.cn: 天气好的时候我喜欢骑车。
sentences.en: When the weather is nice, I like to go cycling.

sentences.cn: 骑车下坡的时候要小心。
sentences.en: Be careful when cycling downhill.

sentences.cn: 我每天早上去公园跑步。
sentences.en: I go running in the park every morning.

sentences.cn: 跑步以前最好先做热身。
sentences.en: It is best to warm up before running.

sentences.cn: 春天我们带着食物去公园野餐。
sentences.en: In spring we bring food to the park for a picnic.

sentences.cn: 野餐的时候，我们坐在草地上吃东西。
sentences.en: During the picnic, we sit on the grass and eat.

sentences.cn: 我们在湖上划船，很轻松。
sentences.en: We went boating on the lake, and it was relaxing.

sentences.cn: 划船的时候两个人要一起用力。
sentences.en: When boating, the two people have to row together.

sentences.cn: 冬天我们去北方滑雪。
sentences.en: In winter we go skiing in the north.

sentences.cn: 第一次滑雪，我摔了很多次。
sentences.en: The first time I went skiing, I fell many times.

sentences.cn: 有风的时候最适合放风筝。
sentences.en: A windy day is the best time for flying a kite.

sentences.cn: 孩子们在广场上放风筝。
sentences.en: The children are flying kites in the square.

sentences.cn: 吃完晚饭我喜欢出去散步。
sentences.en: After dinner I like to go out for a walk.

sentences.cn: 每天散步对身体有好处。
sentences.en: Taking a walk every day is good for your health.

sentences.cn: 爷爷常常和邻居下象棋。
sentences.en: Grandpa often plays Chinese chess with his neighbor.

sentences.cn: 下象棋要多动脑筋。
sentences.en: Playing Chinese chess makes you think hard.

sentences.cn: 围棋的棋盘上有很多黑白棋子。
sentences.en: The go board has many black and white stones.

sentences.cn: 学围棋需要很长时间。
sentences.en: It takes a long time to learn go.

sentences.cn: 他从小就开始学国际象棋。
sentences.en: He started learning chess when he was young.

sentences.cn: 国际象棋里的王最重要。
sentences.en: The king is the most important piece in chess.

sentences.cn: 下雨天我们在家玩跳棋。
sentences.en: On rainy days we play Chinese checkers at home.

sentences.cn: 跳棋可以三四个人一起玩。
sentences.en: Chinese checkers can be played by three or four people together.

sentences.cn: 五子棋的规则很简单，很快就能学会。
sentences.en: The rules of gomoku are simple, and you can learn them quickly.

sentences.cn: 谁先连成五个子，谁就赢了五子棋。
sentences.en: Whoever lines up five stones first wins the game of gomoku.

sentences.cn: 小时候我常和妹妹玩飞行棋。
sentences.en: As a child I often played ludo with my little sister.

sentences.cn: 玩飞行棋要靠掷骰子决定走几步。
sentences.en: In ludo you roll the dice to decide how many steps to move.

sentences.cn: 过节的时候，一家人喜欢打麻将。
sentences.en: During the holidays, the whole family likes to play mahjong.

sentences.cn: 打麻将需要四个人。
sentences.en: Mahjong needs four players.

sentences.cn: 我们几个朋友晚上一起打扑克。
sentences.en: A few of us play cards together in the evening.

sentences.cn: 这副扑克少了一张牌。
sentences.en: This deck of cards is missing one card.

sentences.cn: 军棋是两个人玩的棋类游戏。
sentences.en: Army chess is a board game for two players.

sentences.cn: 我小时候很喜欢下军棋。
sentences.en: I loved playing army chess when I was a child.

sentences.cn: 斗兽棋里，大象最大，老鼠最小。
sentences.en: In animal chess, the elephant is the biggest and the mouse is the smallest.

sentences.cn: 孩子们觉得斗兽棋很好玩。
sentences.en: Children find animal chess fun to play.

sentences.cn: 牙疼的时候要去看牙医。
sentences.en: When you have a toothache, you should see a dentist.

sentences.cn: 牙医让我少吃甜的东西。
sentences.en: The dentist told me to eat fewer sweets.

sentences.cn: 孩子发烧了，我们带他去看儿科医生。
sentences.en: The child had a fever, so we took him to see a pediatrician.

sentences.cn: 儿科医生对小朋友很有耐心。
sentences.en: The pediatrician is very patient with children.

sentences.cn: 我看不清楚，想找眼科医生检查一下。
sentences.en: I can't see clearly, so I want an eye doctor to check my eyes.

sentences.cn: 眼科医生说我需要戴眼镜。
sentences.en: The eye doctor said I need to wear glasses.

sentences.cn: 这位外科医生做过很多手术。
sentences.en: This surgeon has performed many operations.

sentences.cn: 外科医生给病人做了手术。
sentences.en: The surgeon operated on the patient.

sentences.cn: 中医给我开了一些中药。
sentences.en: The TCM doctor prescribed me some Chinese medicine.

sentences.cn: 很多人相信中医能调理身体。
sentences.en: Many people believe a TCM doctor can help balance the body.

sentences.cn: 我家的狗生病了，得去看兽医。
sentences.en: My dog is sick, so we need to see a vet.

sentences.cn: 兽医给小猫打了针。
sentences.en: The vet gave the kitten a shot.

sentences.cn: 脸上长了很多痘痘，我去看皮肤科医生。
sentences.en: I have a lot of pimples on my face, so I went to see a dermatologist.

sentences.cn: 皮肤科医生让我别用太热的水洗脸。
sentences.en: The dermatologist told me not to wash my face with water that is too hot.

sentences.cn: 爷爷的心脏不好，常去看心脏科医生。
sentences.en: Grandpa has a weak heart, so he often sees a cardiologist.

sentences.cn: 心脏科医生让他每天走路半小时。
sentences.en: The cardiologist told him to walk for half an hour every day.

sentences.cn: 半夜他肚子很疼，急诊医生马上来了。
sentences.en: His stomach hurt badly in the middle of the night, and the ER doctor came right away.

sentences.cn: 急诊医生的工作又忙又累。
sentences.en: An ER doctor's job is busy and tiring.

sentences.cn: 有小病的时候，我们先去看家庭医生。
sentences.en: For minor illnesses, we see our family doctor first.

sentences.cn: 家庭医生很了解我们全家的健康。
sentences.en: Our family doctor knows our whole family's health well.

sentences.cn: 我今天头很疼，想早点休息。
sentences.en: My head hurts today, so I want to rest early.

sentences.cn: 他点了点头，表示同意。
sentences.en: He nodded his head to show he agreed.

sentences.cn: 看书太久，我的眼睛很累。
sentences.en: My eyes are tired from reading for too long.

sentences.cn: 她有一双又大又亮的眼睛。
sentences.en: She has big, bright eyes.

sentences.cn: 我感冒了，鼻子不通气。
sentences.en: I have a cold, and my nose is stuffed up.

sentences.cn: 这种花的香味，用鼻子一闻就知道。
sentences.en: You can tell this flower's scent as soon as you smell it with your nose.

sentences.cn: 吃饭的时候不要张着嘴说话。
sentences.en: Don't talk with your mouth open while eating.

sentences.cn: 他捂着嘴笑了起来。
sentences.en: He covered his mouth and laughed.

sentences.cn: 声音太大了，我要捂住耳朵。
sentences.en: The sound is too loud, so I want to cover my ears.

sentences.cn: 兔子的耳朵又长又软。
sentences.en: A rabbit's ears are long and soft.

sentences.cn: 饭前要用肥皂洗手。
sentences.en: Wash your hands with soap before eating.

sentences.cn: 他举起手回答老师的问题。
sentences.en: He raised his hand to answer the teacher's question.

sentences.cn: 走了一天的路，我的脚很疼。
sentences.en: After walking all day, my feet hurt.

sentences.cn: 天冷的时候，我的脚总是很凉。
sentences.en: When it is cold, my feet are always cold.

sentences.cn: 他摔了一跤，胳膊受伤了。
sentences.en: He fell down and hurt his arm.

sentences.cn: 妈妈用胳膊抱着孩子。
sentences.en: The mother holds the child in her arms.

sentences.cn: 他的腿很长，跑得很快。
sentences.en: His legs are long, so he runs fast.

sentences.cn: 跑步以后我的腿有点酸。
sentences.en: After running, my legs feel a little sore.

sentences.cn: 背了很重的书包，我的肩膀好累。
sentences.en: My shoulders are tired from carrying a heavy backpack.

sentences.cn: 爸爸让孩子坐在他的肩膀上。
sentences.en: The dad let the child sit on his shoulders.

sentences.cn: 我有点感冒，去药店买了一盒感冒药。
sentences.en: I have a slight cold, so I bought a box of cold medicine at the pharmacy.

sentences.cn: 这种感冒药一天吃三次，饭后吃。
sentences.en: Take this cold medicine three times a day, after meals.

sentences.cn: 孩子发烧了，我给他吃了退烧药。
sentences.en: My child had a fever, so I gave him a fever reducer.

sentences.cn: 吃了退烧药以后，他的体温慢慢降下来了。
sentences.en: After taking the fever reducer, his temperature slowly came down.

sentences.cn: 我头疼得厉害，吃了一片止痛药。
sentences.en: My head hurt badly, so I took a painkiller.

sentences.cn: 止痛药只能暂时止疼，别吃太多。
sentences.en: Painkillers only stop the pain for a while, so don't take too many.

sentences.cn: 我的手指被刀切破了，贴了一个创可贴。
sentences.en: I cut my finger with a knife and put on a bandage.

sentences.cn: 你包里有创可贴吗？我需要一个。
sentences.en: Do you have a bandage in your bag? I need one.

sentences.cn: 看电脑太久，我的眼睛很干，得滴点眼药水。
sentences.en: After looking at the computer too long, my eyes are dry, so I need some eye drops.

sentences.cn: 睡觉前记得点两滴眼药水。
sentences.en: Remember to put in two drops of eye drops before sleeping.

sentences.cn: 医生说我应该每天吃一片维生素。
sentences.en: The doctor said I should take one vitamin every day.

sentences.cn: 多吃水果和蔬菜可以补充维生素。
sentences.en: Eating more fruit and vegetables can give you more vitamins.

sentences.cn: 这种药片有点苦，用温水送服。
sentences.en: These pills are a little bitter; take them with warm water.

sentences.cn: 请一次吃两片药片，别忘了。
sentences.en: Please take two pills at a time, and don't forget.

sentences.cn: 孩子不会吞药片，医生开了药水。
sentences.en: The child can't swallow pills, so the doctor prescribed liquid medicine.

sentences.cn: 喝药水以前，先摇一摇瓶子。
sentences.en: Before drinking the liquid medicine, shake the bottle first.

sentences.cn: 奶奶咳嗽的时候喜欢喝中药。
sentences.en: When Grandma coughs, she likes to drink Chinese medicine.

sentences.cn: 这副中药要煮四十分钟才能喝。
sentences.en: This Chinese medicine has to be boiled for forty minutes before drinking.

sentences.cn: 伤口有点红肿，医生让我吃消炎药。
sentences.en: The wound is a bit red and swollen, so the doctor told me to take an anti-inflammatory.

sentences.cn: 消炎药要按时吃，吃满一个星期。
sentences.en: Take the anti-inflammatory on time, for a full week.

sentences.cn: 我昨天淋了雨，今天感冒了。
sentences.en: I got caught in the rain yesterday, and today I caught a cold.

sentences.cn: 感冒的时候要多喝热水，好好休息。
sentences.en: When you have a cold, drink more hot water and rest well.

sentences.cn: 他额头很烫，可能发烧了。
sentences.en: His forehead is very hot; he may have a fever.

sentences.cn: 我发烧到三十九度，去了医院。
sentences.en: My fever reached thirty-nine degrees, so I went to the hospital.

sentences.cn: 他咳嗽了一个星期，还没好。
sentences.en: He has been coughing for a week and still isn't better.

sentences.cn: 晚上咳嗽得厉害，我睡不好。
sentences.en: I cough badly at night, so I can't sleep well.

sentences.cn: 我昨晚没睡好，今天一直头疼。
sentences.en: I didn't sleep well last night, so I've had a headache all day.

sentences.cn: 头疼的时候，我喜欢闭上眼睛休息一下。
sentences.en: When I have a headache, I like to close my eyes and rest a while.

sentences.cn: 吃了太多冰淇淋，我肚子疼。
sentences.en: I ate too much ice cream, so I have a stomachache.

sentences.cn: 他肚子疼得站不起来。
sentences.en: His stomach hurts so much he can't stand up.

sentences.cn: 我牙疼，晚上要去看牙医。
sentences.en: I have a toothache, so I'm going to the dentist tonight.

sentences.cn: 吃太多糖容易牙疼。
sentences.en: Eating too much candy easily gives you a toothache.

sentences.cn: 他吃坏了肚子，一直拉肚子。
sentences.en: He ate something bad and has had diarrhea ever since.

sentences.cn: 拉肚子的时候要多喝水，少吃油腻的东西。
sentences.en: When you have diarrhea, drink more water and eat fewer greasy things.

sentences.cn: 我对花粉过敏，春天总是打喷嚏。
sentences.en: I'm allergic to pollen, so I always sneeze in spring.

sentences.cn: 她吃海鲜会过敏，脸上起红点。
sentences.en: She gets an allergy from seafood, and red spots appear on her face.

sentences.cn: 我昨天唱歌唱太久，今天嗓子疼。
sentences.en: I sang for too long yesterday, so today I have a sore throat.

sentences.cn: 嗓子疼的时候，喝点热蜂蜜水会舒服些。
sentences.en: When you have a sore throat, drinking some warm honey water helps.

sentences.cn: 天气一冷，我就开始流鼻涕。
sentences.en: As soon as it gets cold, I start to have a runny nose.

sentences.cn: 他一直流鼻涕，用了很多纸巾。
sentences.en: He has a runny nose all the time and has used a lot of tissues.

sentences.cn: 从窗户可以看到远处的山。
sentences.en: From the window you can see the mountains in the distance.

sentences.cn: 我戴上眼镜才能看清楚黑板上的字。
sentences.en: I can only see the words on the blackboard clearly with my glasses on.

sentences.cn: 我听到门铃响了，有人来了。
sentences.en: I heard the doorbell ring; someone has come.

sentences.cn: 房间太吵，我听不清你说的话。
sentences.en: The room is too noisy; I can't hear clearly what you're saying.

sentences.cn: 我闻到厨房里飘来的香味。
sentences.en: I can smell the aroma drifting from the kitchen.

sentences.cn: 这朵花闻起来很香。
sentences.en: This flower smells very sweet.

sentences.cn: 你尝一尝这个汤，看看够不够咸。
sentences.en: Taste this soup and see if it's salty enough.

sentences.cn: 我第一次尝到这么甜的芒果。
sentences.en: This is the first time I've tasted such a sweet mango.

sentences.cn: 这只猫的毛摸起来很软。
sentences.en: This cat's fur feels very soft to the touch.

sentences.cn: 别摸那个锅，它还很烫。
sentences.en: Don't touch that pot; it's still very hot.

sentences.cn: 我摔了一跤，膝盖很痛。
sentences.en: I took a fall, and my knee really hurts.

sentences.cn: 如果哪里痛，请告诉医生。
sentences.en: If anywhere hurts, please tell the doctor.

sentences.cn: 外面下雪了，我觉得很冷。
sentences.en: It's snowing outside, and I feel very cold.

sentences.cn: 你冷不冷？我给你拿一件外套。
sentences.en: Are you cold? I'll get you a coat.

sentences.cn: 今天太热了，我想开空调。
sentences.en: It's too hot today; I want to turn on the air conditioner.

sentences.cn: 跑完步以后，我觉得全身发热。
sentences.en: After running, I feel hot all over.

sentences.cn: 被蚊子咬了，我的胳膊很痒。
sentences.en: A mosquito bit me, and my arm is very itchy.

sentences.cn: 这件毛衣穿着有点痒。
sentences.en: This sweater is a bit itchy to wear.

sentences.cn: 走了一天路，我特别累。
sentences.en: I walked all day, so I'm especially tired.

sentences.cn: 太累的时候，早点睡觉最好。
sentences.en: When you're too tired, it's best to go to bed early.

sentences.cn: 老师在黑板上画了一个圆形。
sentences.en: The teacher drew a circle on the blackboard.

sentences.cn: 满月是圆形的，又大又亮。
sentences.en: The full moon is a circle, big and bright.

sentences.cn: 这块手帕是方形的。
sentences.en: This handkerchief is square.

sentences.cn: 我们家的桌子是方形的，四个人坐正好。
sentences.en: Our table is square, just right for four people.

sentences.cn: 请在纸上画一个三角形。
sentences.en: Please draw a triangle on the paper.

sentences.cn: 三角形有三条边和三个角。
sentences.en: A triangle has three sides and three corners.

sentences.cn: 手机的屏幕是长方形的。
sentences.en: A phone screen is a rectangle.

sentences.cn: 这本书是长方形的，放进包里正好。
sentences.en: This book is rectangular and fits just right in the bag.

sentences.cn: 她送了我一块心形的巧克力。
sentences.en: She gave me a heart-shaped chocolate.

sentences.cn: 情人节的卡片上有很多心形。
sentences.en: There are many heart shapes on the Valentine's Day card.

sentences.cn: 孩子把星形的贴纸贴在本子上。
sentences.en: The child stuck a star-shaped sticker on the notebook.

sentences.cn: 圣诞树的顶上有一个金色的星形。
sentences.en: There is a golden star on top of the Christmas tree.

sentences.cn: 鸡蛋是椭圆形的。
sentences.en: An egg is oval-shaped.

sentences.cn: 这面镜子是椭圆形的，挂在墙上很好看。
sentences.en: This mirror is oval and looks nice on the wall.

sentences.cn: 这条围巾上有红色的菱形图案。
sentences.en: This scarf has a red diamond pattern on it.

sentences.cn: 风筝常常做成菱形。
sentences.en: Kites are often made in a diamond shape.

sentences.cn: 老师教我们怎么画五角形。
sentences.en: The teacher taught us how to draw a pentagon.

sentences.cn: 这个盒子的底是五角形的。
sentences.en: The bottom of this box is a pentagon.

sentences.cn: 蜂窝是由很多六角形组成的。
sentences.en: A honeycomb is made up of many hexagons.

sentences.cn: 这块地砖是六角形的。
sentences.en: This floor tile is a hexagon.

sentences.cn: 春节的时候，我们全家一起吃年夜饭。
sentences.en: During Spring Festival, our whole family eats the New Year's Eve dinner together.

sentences.cn: 春节我要回老家看爷爷奶奶。
sentences.en: For Spring Festival I'm going back to my hometown to see my grandparents.

sentences.cn: 中秋节我们一边赏月，一边吃月饼。
sentences.en: On the Mid-Autumn Festival we admire the moon and eat mooncakes.

sentences.cn: 中秋节是全家团圆的日子。
sentences.en: The Mid-Autumn Festival is a day for the whole family to reunite.

sentences.cn: 端午节我们包粽子、看龙舟比赛。
sentences.en: People wrap zongzi and watch dragon boat races on the Dragon Boat Festival.

sentences.cn: 妈妈端午节买了很多粽子。
sentences.en: Mom bought a lot of zongzi for the Dragon Boat Festival.

sentences.cn: 元宵节晚上，街上挂满了灯笼。
sentences.en: On the night of the Lantern Festival, the streets are hung full of lanterns.

sentences.cn: 元宵节我们一起吃汤圆，猜灯谜。
sentences.en: At the Lantern Festival we eat sweet rice balls and guess lantern riddles.

sentences.cn: 清明节我们全家去给祖先扫墓。
sentences.en: Our whole family goes to sweep the ancestors' graves on Tomb-Sweeping Day.

sentences.cn: 清明节前后常常下雨。
sentences.en: It often rains around Tomb-Sweeping Day.

sentences.cn: 国庆节有七天假，我打算去旅游。
sentences.en: There are seven days off for National Day, and I plan to travel.

sentences.cn: 国庆节广场上有很多人看升国旗。
sentences.en: Many people watch the flag-raising in the square on National Day.

sentences.cn: 儿童节，学校给孩子们准备了礼物。
sentences.en: The school prepared gifts for the children on Children's Day.

sentences.cn: 六月一号是儿童节。
sentences.en: June first is Children's Day.

sentences.cn: 教师节我们给老师送了一束花。
sentences.en: We gave our teacher a bunch of flowers on Teachers' Day.

sentences.cn: 教师节那天，学生们对老师说谢谢。
sentences.en: That day, the students said thank you to their teachers.

sentences.cn: 圣诞节，商店里放着欢快的音乐。
sentences.en: At Christmas, cheerful music plays in the shops.

sentences.cn: 圣诞节前，我们一起装饰圣诞树。
sentences.en: Before Christmas, we decorate the Christmas tree together.

sentences.cn: 母亲节我给妈妈做了一顿早饭。
sentences.en: On Mother's Day I made breakfast for my mom.

sentences.cn: 母亲节快到了，我想送妈妈一张贺卡。
sentences.en: Mother's Day is coming soon, and I want to give my mom a card.

sentences.cn: 在中国买东西要用人民币。
sentences.en: You need to use RMB to buy things in China.

sentences.cn: 这件衣服一百人民币，不算贵。
sentences.en: This piece of clothing costs a hundred RMB, which isn't expensive.

sentences.cn: 我去银行把人民币换成了美元。
sentences.en: I went to the bank and changed RMB into US dollars.

sentences.cn: 今天一美元大约换七块人民币。
sentences.en: Today one US dollar exchanges for about seven RMB.

sentences.cn: 去法国旅游要用欧元。
sentences.en: You need euros to travel in France.

sentences.cn: 我手里还剩五十欧元。
sentences.en: I still have fifty euros left in my hand.

sentences.cn: 在日本，这碗面要八百日元。
sentences.en: In Japan, this bowl of noodles costs eight hundred yen.

sentences.cn: 出发去东京以前，我先换了一些日元。
sentences.en: Before leaving for Tokyo, I changed some yen first.

sentences.cn: 在伦敦坐地铁要付英镑。
sentences.en: In London you pay for the subway in pounds.

sentences.cn: 这本书标价十英镑。
sentences.en: This book is priced at ten pounds.

sentences.cn: 在香港的商店可以用港币付钱。
sentences.en: You can pay with HK dollars in Hong Kong shops.

sentences.cn: 我用港币买了一杯奶茶。
sentences.en: I bought a cup of milk tea with HK dollars.

sentences.cn: 在首尔购物要用韩元。
sentences.en: You use won when shopping in Seoul.

sentences.cn: 一万韩元大概是五十多块人民币。
sentences.en: Ten thousand won is roughly more than fifty RMB.

sentences.cn: 卢布是俄罗斯用的货币。
sentences.en: The ruble is the currency used in Russia.

sentences.cn: 我在莫斯科的机场换了一些卢布。
sentences.en: I exchanged some rubles at the Moscow airport.

sentences.cn: 在新加坡吃饭要付新加坡元。
sentences.en: You pay in SG dollars when eating in Singapore.

sentences.cn: 这张地铁卡里有二十新加坡元。
sentences.en: This subway card has twenty SG dollars on it.

sentences.cn: 在曼谷的夜市，我用泰铢买了小吃。
sentences.en: At the Bangkok night market, I bought snacks with baht.

sentences.cn: 一百泰铢可以买很多水果。
sentences.en: A hundred baht can buy a lot of fruit.

sentences.cn: 太阳从东边升起来。
sentences.en: The sun rises in the east.

sentences.cn: 往东走五分钟就到地铁站了。
sentences.en: Walk east for five minutes and you'll reach the subway station.

sentences.cn: 我家的窗户朝南，冬天很暖和。
sentences.en: My home's windows face south, so it's warm in winter.

sentences.cn: 冬天很多鸟往南飞。
sentences.en: In winter many birds fly south.

sentences.cn: 太阳从西边落下去。
sentences.en: The sun sets in the west.

sentences.cn: 银行在超市的西边。
sentences.en: The bank is to the west of the supermarket.

sentences.cn: 中国的北方冬天很冷。
sentences.en: The north of China is very cold in winter.

sentences.cn: 请一直往北走，别拐弯。
sentences.en: Please keep walking north and don't turn.

sentences.cn: 电梯正在往上走。
sentences.en: The elevator is going up.

sentences.cn: 往上看，天上有一只风筝。
sentences.en: Look up; there is a kite in the sky.

sentences.cn: 电梯往下走，到一楼停。
sentences.en: The elevator goes down and stops on the first floor.

sentences.cn: 小心台阶，往下走的时候扶好。
sentences.en: Watch the steps; hold on as you go down.

sentences.cn: 到路口以后往左拐。
sentences.en: Turn left when you reach the intersection.

sentences.cn: 我的左边坐着一位老人。
sentences.en: An old man is sitting on my left.

sentences.cn: 银行在你的右边。
sentences.en: The bank is on your right.

sentences.cn: 过了桥往右走就到了。
sentences.en: Cross the bridge and turn right, and you'll be there.

sentences.cn: 老师站在教室的前面。
sentences.en: The teacher stands at the front of the classroom.

sentences.cn: 前面有一家咖啡店，我们去坐坐吧。
sentences.en: There's a coffee shop up front; let's go sit for a while.

sentences.cn: 请排在我的后面。
sentences.en: Please line up behind me.

sentences.cn: 房子后面有一个小花园。
sentences.en: There is a small garden behind the house.

sentences.cn: 拍照的时候，请大家笑一笑。
sentences.en: When taking the photo, everyone please smile.

sentences.cn: 听到这个好消息，她笑了。
sentences.en: On hearing the good news, she smiled.

sentences.cn: 小孩找不到妈妈，哭了起来。
sentences.en: The child couldn't find his mother and started to cry.

sentences.cn: 电影太感人了，她看哭了。
sentences.en: The movie was so touching that she cried while watching it.

sentences.cn: 我迟到了，老板有点生气。
sentences.en: I was late, and the boss was a bit angry.

sentences.cn: 别生气了，这只是个小误会。
sentences.en: Don't be angry; it's just a small misunderstanding.

sentences.cn: 看到这么大的蛋糕，孩子们很惊讶。
sentences.en: The children were surprised to see such a big cake.

sentences.cn: 听到他要结婚，我很惊讶。
sentences.en: I was surprised to hear he was getting married.

sentences.cn: 打雷的时候，小狗很害怕。
sentences.en: When it thunders, the puppy is very scared.

sentences.cn: 她一个人在家有点害怕。
sentences.en: She feels a bit scared home alone.

sentences.cn: 宠物生病了，他很难过。
sentences.en: His pet was sick, and he felt very sad.

sentences.cn: 别难过，明天会更好。
sentences.en: Don't be sad; tomorrow will be better.

sentences.cn: 收到礼物，妹妹非常高兴。
sentences.en: My little sister was very happy to get the gift.

sentences.cn: 今天见到老朋友，我很高兴。
sentences.en: I was happy to see an old friend today.

sentences.cn: 中午没睡觉，我下午很困。
sentences.en: I didn't nap at noon, so I'm very sleepy in the afternoon.

sentences.cn: 他困得眼睛都睁不开了。
sentences.en: He is so sleepy he can't even keep his eyes open.

sentences.cn: 第一次上台，他有点害羞。
sentences.en: On stage for the first time, he was a bit shy.

sentences.cn: 小女孩害羞地躲在妈妈后面。
sentences.en: The little girl shyly hid behind her mother.

sentences.cn: 他一看到难题就皱眉。
sentences.en: He frowns as soon as he sees a hard problem.

sentences.cn: 闻到怪味，她皱了皱眉。
sentences.en: Smelling the strange odor, she frowned.

sentences.cn: 孩子们在操场上踢球。
sentences.en: The children are kicking a ball on the playground.

sentences.cn: 这个球滚到桌子下面去了。
sentences.en: The ball rolled under the table.

sentences.cn: 今晚的月亮又圆又亮。
sentences.en: Tonight's moon is round and bright.

sentences.cn: 中秋节的月亮特别圆。
sentences.en: The moon on the Mid-Autumn Festival is especially round.

sentences.cn: 早上的太阳照进了房间。
sentences.en: The morning sun shines into the room.

sentences.cn: 太阳太晒了，我们找个树荫吧。
sentences.en: The sun is too strong; let's find some shade.

sentences.cn: 请把菜放在这个盘子里。
sentences.en: Please put the dish on this plate.

sentences.cn: 吃完饭，我帮妈妈洗盘子。
sentences.en: After the meal, I help my mom wash the plates.

sentences.cn: 我在口袋里找到一枚硬币。
sentences.en: I found a coin in my pocket.

sentences.cn: 他把硬币投进了存钱罐。
sentences.en: He dropped the coin into the piggy bank.

sentences.cn: 夏天吃一块冰西瓜真凉快。
sentences.en: Eating a slice of cold watermelon in summer is so refreshing.

sentences.cn: 这个西瓜又大又圆，很甜。
sentences.en: This watermelon is big, round, and sweet.

sentences.cn: 墙上的时钟指着十点。
sentences.en: The clock on the wall points to ten o'clock.

sentences.cn: 这个圆圆的时钟是奶奶送的。
sentences.en: This round clock was a gift from Grandma.

sentences.cn: 自行车的轮子坏了，我推着走。
sentences.en: The bike's wheel broke, so I pushed it along.

sentences.cn: 汽车有四个轮子。
sentences.en: A car has four wheels.

sentences.cn: 我早上煮了两个鸡蛋。
sentences.en: I boiled two eggs this morning.

sentences.cn: 请小心，鸡蛋很容易破。
sentences.en: Please be careful; eggs break easily.

sentences.cn: 生日会上挂了很多彩色的气球。
sentences.en: Many colorful balloons were hung at the birthday party.

sentences.cn: 气球飞到了天上，孩子哭了。
sentences.en: The balloon flew up into the sky, and the child cried.

sentences.cn: 大象用长长的鼻子喝水。
sentences.en: The elephant drinks water with its long trunk.

sentences.cn: 动物园里的大象很受孩子们欢迎。
sentences.en: The elephants at the zoo are very popular with the children.

sentences.cn: 鲸鱼是海里最大的动物。
sentences.en: The whale is the largest animal in the sea.

sentences.cn: 我们坐船去海上看鲸鱼。
sentences.en: We took a boat out to sea to watch whales.

sentences.cn: 长颈鹿的脖子很长，能吃到树上的叶子。
sentences.en: The giraffe's neck is very long, so it can eat leaves in the trees.

sentences.cn: 孩子们最喜欢看长颈鹿。
sentences.en: The children most like watching the giraffes.

sentences.cn: 河马喜欢泡在水里。
sentences.en: The hippo likes to soak in the water.

sentences.cn: 河马的嘴巴张得很大。
sentences.en: The hippo opens its mouth very wide.

sentences.cn: 犀牛的头上有一只角。
sentences.en: The rhino has a horn on its head.

sentences.cn: 犀牛看起来慢，其实跑得很快。
sentences.en: The rhino looks slow, but it actually runs very fast.

sentences.cn: 熊冬天要睡很长时间。
sentences.en: Bears sleep for a long time in winter.

sentences.cn: 我们在山里看到了一只黑熊。
sentences.en: We saw a black bear in the mountains.

sentences.cn: 老虎身上有黑色的花纹。
sentences.en: The tiger has black stripes on its body.

sentences.cn: 老虎跑得很快，非常厉害。
sentences.en: The tiger runs fast and is very fierce.

sentences.cn: 狮子被叫做草原之王。
sentences.en: The lion is called the king of the grassland.

sentences.cn: 公狮子有一圈长长的鬃毛。
sentences.en: The male lion has a ring of long mane.

sentences.cn: 农民用牛在地里干活。
sentences.en: The farmer uses an ox to work in the field.

sentences.cn: 那头牛正在草地上吃草。
sentences.en: That ox is grazing on the grass.

sentences.cn: 骆驼可以在沙漠里走很远。
sentences.en: A camel can walk very far in the desert.

sentences.cn: 骆驼的背上有两个驼峰。
sentences.en: The camel has two humps on its back.

sentences.cn: 一队蚂蚁正把面包渣搬回洞里。
sentences.en: A line of ants is carrying bread crumbs back to their nest.

sentences.cn: 花园的地上有一个小小的蚂蚁窝。
sentences.en: There is a tiny ant nest on the ground in the garden.

sentences.cn: 半夜厨房里传来老鼠啃东西的声音。
sentences.en: At midnight there was a sound of a mouse gnawing in the kitchen.

sentences.cn: 那只老鼠一看到人就钻进了墙洞。
sentences.en: As soon as the mouse saw people, it darted into a hole in the wall.

sentences.cn: 蜜蜂在花丛里飞来飞去采蜜。
sentences.en: Bees fly around the flowers gathering nectar.

sentences.cn: 别去拍蜜蜂，小心它会蜇你。
sentences.en: Don't swat at the bee; be careful, it might sting you.

sentences.cn: 一只黄蝴蝶轻轻落在了窗台上。
sentences.en: A yellow butterfly landed gently on the windowsill.

sentences.cn: 花园里的蝴蝶张开翅膀晒太阳。
sentences.en: The butterfly in the garden spreads its wings in the sun.

sentences.cn: 下雨以后，池塘边的青蛙叫个不停。
sentences.en: After the rain, the frogs by the pond croak nonstop.

sentences.cn: 青蛙一下子跳进水里，不见了。
sentences.en: The frog jumped into the water at once and disappeared.

sentences.cn: 仓鼠把食物塞进两边的腮帮子里。
sentences.en: The hamster stuffs food into its cheeks on both sides.

sentences.cn: 我们要轻轻地把仓鼠捧在手心里。
sentences.en: We should gently cup the hamster in our palms.

sentences.cn: 一只红瓢虫停在绿色的叶子上。
sentences.en: A red ladybug rests on a green leaf.

sentences.cn: 瓢虫身上有黑色的小圆点。
sentences.en: A ladybug has little black dots on its back.

sentences.cn: 雨后，蜗牛慢慢地爬过湿湿的墙。
sentences.en: After the rain, the snail slowly crawls across the wet wall.

sentences.cn: 蜗牛一碰到手就把头缩回壳里。
sentences.en: The moment you touch it, the snail pulls its head back into its shell.

sentences.cn: 树上的小鸟叽叽喳喳，很热闹。
sentences.en: The little birds in the tree chirp noisily.

sentences.cn: 我在阳台上放了一些米给小鸟吃。
sentences.en: I put some rice on the balcony for the little birds.

sentences.cn: 金鱼张着嘴，在水面上等着吃食。
sentences.en: The goldfish opens its mouth at the surface, waiting to be fed.

sentences.cn: 我每天只喂金鱼一点点鱼食。
sentences.en: I feed the goldfish only a tiny bit of food each day.

sentences.cn: 飞机在跑道上加速，很快就飞上了天。
sentences.en: The airplane speeds up on the runway and quickly lifts into the sky.

sentences.cn: 这架飞机几个小时就能飞到另一个国家。
sentences.en: This airplane can reach another country in just a few hours.

sentences.cn: 火箭喷着火焰，一下子冲向天空。
sentences.en: Trailing flames, the rocket shoots up into the sky at once.

sentences.cn: 火箭的速度比任何飞机都要快得多。
sentences.en: A rocket is far faster than any airplane.

sentences.cn: 坐高铁去上海，两个小时就到了。
sentences.en: Taking the high-speed train, we reach Shanghai in two hours.

sentences.cn: 高铁开得又快又稳，窗外的树飞快地过去。
sentences.en: The high-speed train runs fast and steady; the trees rush past the window.

sentences.cn: 赛车在弯道上飞快地转过去。
sentences.en: The race car whips around the bend at high speed.

sentences.cn: 发令枪一响，几辆赛车立刻冲了出去。
sentences.en: At the starting gun, the race cars shot off instantly.

sentences.cn: 猎豹几秒钟就追上了前面的猎物。
sentences.en: In just seconds the cheetah caught up with the prey ahead.

sentences.cn: 猎豹是陆地上跑得最快的动物。
sentences.en: The cheetah is the fastest animal on land.

sentences.cn: 一道闪电划过天空，接着就是雷声。
sentences.en: A bolt of lightning cut across the sky, then came the thunder.

sentences.cn: 闪电来得太快，我们几乎看不清。
sentences.en: The lightning came so fast we could barely see it.

sentences.cn: 台风来的时候，风大得能吹倒大树。
sentences.en: When the typhoon comes, the wind is strong enough to knock down big trees.

sentences.cn: 风一下子把我手里的纸吹走了。
sentences.en: The wind suddenly blew the paper out of my hand.

sentences.cn: 他骑着摩托车，很快就穿过了小巷。
sentences.en: He rode the motorcycle and quickly cut through the alley.

sentences.cn: 骑摩托车一定要戴好头盔。
sentences.en: You must wear a helmet when riding a motorcycle.

sentences.cn: 子弹射出去的一瞬间，快得看不见。
sentences.en: The instant a bullet is fired, it is too fast to see.

sentences.cn: 火车开得飞快，人们叫它子弹头列车。
sentences.en: The train runs so fast that people call it a bullet train.

sentences.cn: 光的速度是世界上最快的。
sentences.en: The speed of light is the fastest in the world.

sentences.cn: 一打开灯，光马上照亮了整个房间。
sentences.en: The moment I switched it on, the light filled the whole room.

sentences.cn: 老虎在森林里安静地靠近猎物。
sentences.en: The tiger quietly closes in on its prey in the forest.

sentences.cn: 参观动物园时，别把手伸进老虎的笼子。
sentences.en: At the zoo, never put your hand into the tiger's cage.

sentences.cn: 狮子饿的时候，叫声能传到很远。
sentences.en: When a lion is hungry, its roar carries very far.

sentences.cn: 在草原上看到狮子，一定要待在车里。
sentences.en: If you see a lion on the grassland, stay inside the car.

sentences.cn: 海里发现鲨鱼时，大家赶紧游回岸边。
sentences.en: When a shark was spotted, everyone hurried back to shore.

sentences.cn: 鲨鱼的牙齿又尖又多，非常危险。
sentences.en: A shark's teeth are sharp and many, and very dangerous.

sentences.cn: 走山路时要小心草丛里的蛇。
sentences.en: On mountain paths, watch out for snakes in the grass.

sentences.cn: 有些蛇有毒，被咬了要马上去医院。
sentences.en: Some snakes are venomous; if bitten, go to the hospital at once.

sentences.cn: 鳄鱼常常一动不动地躲在水里。
sentences.en: The crocodile often lies motionless, hidden in the water.

sentences.cn: 河边有鳄鱼，请不要靠近水边。
sentences.en: There are crocodiles by the river; please don't go near the water.

sentences.cn: 狼常常一群一起出来找食物。
sentences.en: Wolves often come out in a pack to look for food.

sentences.cn: 冬天的夜里，山上传来狼的叫声。
sentences.en: On winter nights, wolf howls come from the mountains.

sentences.cn: 在山里遇到熊，不要跑，要慢慢后退。
sentences.en: If you meet a bear in the mountains, don't run; back away slowly.

sentences.cn: 熊看起来很慢，其实跑得很快。
sentences.en: A bear looks slow, but it actually runs fast.

sentences.cn: 沙漠里的蝎子白天躲在石头下面。
sentences.en: Desert scorpions hide under rocks during the day.

sentences.cn: 被蝎子蜇到，皮肤会又疼又肿。
sentences.en: A scorpion sting leaves the skin painful and swollen.

sentences.cn: 别去动树上的黄蜂窝，小心被蜇。
sentences.en: Don't disturb the wasp nest in the tree; watch out for stings.

sentences.cn: 一群黄蜂飞过来，我们赶紧跑开了。
sentences.en: A swarm of wasps flew over and we quickly ran away.

sentences.cn: 豹子喜欢爬到树上等着猎物。
sentences.en: The leopard likes to climb a tree and wait for prey.

sentences.cn: 豹子身上的花纹让它藏在草里很难被发现。
sentences.en: The leopard's spots let it hide in the grass and stay hard to spot.

topics.titleEn: Ten Types of Things That Fly

sentences.cn: 几只鸟从我们头顶飞过，落在了电线上。
sentences.en: A few birds flew over our heads and landed on the wire.

sentences.cn: 每天早上都有鸟停在窗外的树枝上。
sentences.en: Every morning birds perch on the branch outside the window.

sentences.cn: 我们在机场看飞机一架接一架起飞。
sentences.en: At the airport we watched airplanes take off one after another.

sentences.cn: 飞机穿过白云，越飞越高。
sentences.en: The airplane passed through the white clouds, climbing higher and higher.

sentences.cn: 公园里的蝴蝶在花间飞来飞去。
sentences.en: Butterflies flit among the flowers in the park.

sentences.cn: 一只蝴蝶飞进教室，孩子们都笑了。
sentences.en: A butterfly flew into the classroom and the children all laughed.

sentences.cn: 蜜蜂扇着翅膀，停在一朵花上。
sentences.en: Beating its wings, the bee settles on a flower.

sentences.cn: 春天一到，花园里满是飞舞的蜜蜂。
sentences.en: When spring arrives, the garden is full of flying bees.

sentences.cn: 风一大，风筝就飞得又高又稳。
sentences.en: When the wind picks up, the kite flies high and steady.

sentences.cn: 孩子在草地上拉着线，让风筝飞起来。
sentences.en: The child pulls the string on the lawn to get the kite up.

sentences.cn: 他一松手，红气球就飞上了天。
sentences.en: He let go, and the red balloon floated up into the sky.

sentences.cn: 气球里装了气，能在空中飘很久。
sentences.en: Filled with gas, the balloon can drift in the air for a long time.

sentences.cn: 雨前，蜻蜓在池塘上低低地飞。
sentences.en: Before the rain, dragonflies fly low over the pond.

sentences.cn: 一只蜻蜓停在荷叶上，翅膀亮亮的。
sentences.en: A dragonfly rests on a lotus leaf, its wings shiny.

sentences.cn: 火箭点火后，笔直地飞向天空。
sentences.en: After ignition, the rocket flies straight up into the sky.

sentences.cn: 电视里正在播火箭升空的画面。
sentences.en: The TV is showing footage of a rocket lifting off.

sentences.cn: 直升机在楼顶上方停了下来。
sentences.en: The helicopter hovered above the rooftop.

sentences.cn: 直升机的螺旋桨转得很快，声音很大。
sentences.en: The helicopter's rotor spins fast and is very loud.

sentences.cn: 天一黑，蝙蝠就从山洞里飞出来。
sentences.en: As soon as it gets dark, bats fly out of the cave.

sentences.cn: 蝙蝠晚上飞的时候靠声音找路。
sentences.en: When bats fly at night, they find their way by sound.

topics.titleEn: Ten Types of Things in the Kitchen

sentences.cn: 妈妈把剩下的菜放进冰箱里。
sentences.en: Mom put the leftover food into the fridge.

sentences.cn: 冰箱里的牛奶快喝完了，得再买一瓶。
sentences.en: The milk in the fridge is almost gone; we need to buy another bottle.

sentences.cn: 他在炉子上煮了一锅热汤。
sentences.en: He cooked a pot of hot soup on the stove.

sentences.cn: 离开厨房前，记得把炉子关掉。
sentences.en: Before leaving the kitchen, remember to turn off the stove.

sentences.cn: 锅里的水开了，可以下面条了。
sentences.en: The water in the pot is boiling; we can put in the noodles.

sentences.cn: 用完锅以后要洗干净再收起来。
sentences.en: After using the pot, wash it clean before putting it away.

sentences.cn: 吃完饭，我把碗都拿到水池里洗。
sentences.en: After the meal, I took all the bowls to the sink to wash.

sentences.cn: 请帮我拿两个碗和一双筷子。
sentences.en: Please get me two bowls and a pair of chopsticks.

sentences.cn: 用刀切菜的时候要小心手指。
sentences.en: Be careful with your fingers when cutting vegetables with a knife.

sentences.cn: 这把刀很快，一下就把苹果切开了。
sentences.en: This knife is sharp; it cut the apple open in one go.

sentences.cn: 奶奶教小孩子怎么拿筷子。
sentences.en: Grandma teaches the child how to hold chopsticks.

sentences.cn: 吃饭前，他给每个人摆好了筷子。
sentences.en: Before the meal, he set out chopsticks for everyone.

sentences.cn: 水池里堆满了要洗的碗和杯子。
sentences.en: The sink is piled with bowls and cups to be washed.

sentences.cn: 洗完菜，他把水池擦得干干净净。
sentences.en: After washing the vegetables, he wiped the sink spotless.

sentences.cn: 用微波炉热一下昨天的饭。
sentences.en: Reheat yesterday's rice in the microwave.

sentences.cn: 微波炉响了，牛奶已经热好了。
sentences.en: The microwave beeped; the milk is warmed up.

sentences.cn: 他在菜板上把青菜切成小块。
sentences.en: He cut the greens into small pieces on the cutting board.

sentences.cn: 切肉和切菜最好用不同的菜板。
sentences.en: It is best to use different cutting boards for meat and vegetables.

sentences.cn: 桌子脏了，用抹布擦一擦。
sentences.en: The table is dirty; wipe it with the dishcloth.

sentences.cn: 这块抹布湿了，我去换一块干的。
sentences.en: This dishcloth is wet; I will go get a dry one.

topics.titleEn: Ten Types of Things at School

sentences.cn: 老师在黑板上写下今天的作业。
sentences.en: The teacher wrote today's homework on the blackboard.

sentences.cn: 下课后，我帮老师把黑板擦干净。
sentences.en: After class, I helped the teacher wipe the blackboard clean.

sentences.cn: 我的课桌上放着书和一个笔袋。
sentences.en: On my desk are books and a pencil case.

sentences.cn: 上课前，大家把课桌排得整整齐齐。
sentences.en: Before class, everyone lined up the desks neatly.

sentences.cn: 他从书包里拿出语文书。
sentences.en: He took the Chinese book out of his backpack.

sentences.cn: 图书馆的这本书很厚，要两周才看得完。
sentences.en: This library book is thick; it takes two weeks to finish.

sentences.cn: 我的笔没水了，可以借我一支吗？
sentences.en: My pen is out of ink; can you lend me one?

sentences.cn: 考试的时候，他带了两支笔。
sentences.en: For the exam, he brought two pens.

sentences.cn: 他的书包里装满了课本和作业。
sentences.en: His backpack is packed with textbooks and homework.

sentences.cn: 放学后，我背上书包就回家了。
sentences.en: After school, I put on my backpack and went home.

sentences.cn: 老师用粉笔在黑板上画了一个圆。
sentences.en: The teacher drew a circle on the blackboard with chalk.

sentences.cn: 粉笔断了，掉了一地的白灰。
sentences.en: The chalk broke and left white dust all over the floor.

sentences.cn: 写错了字，就用橡皮擦掉重写。
sentences.en: If you write a character wrong, erase it and rewrite it.

sentences.cn: 我的橡皮不见了，你看到了吗？
sentences.en: My eraser is missing; have you seen it?

sentences.cn: 他用尺子在本子上画了一条直线。
sentences.en: He drew a straight line in his notebook with a ruler.

sentences.cn: 数学课上要用到尺子和铅笔。
sentences.en: You need a ruler and a pencil in math class.

sentences.cn: 下课了，同学们都跑到操场上玩。
sentences.en: At recess, the students all ran out to the playground.

sentences.cn: 每天早上我们在操场上跑步。
sentences.en: Every morning we run on the playground.

sentences.cn: 上课铃一响，大家都回到座位上。
sentences.en: When the bell rang, everyone returned to their seats.

sentences.cn: 听到下课铃，孩子们高兴地跑出教室。
sentences.en: Hearing the dismissal bell, the children happily ran out of the classroom.

topics.titleEn: Ten Types of Things in the Park

sentences.cn: 公园里的大树下面很凉快。
sentences.en: It is cool under the big tree in the park.

sentences.cn: 秋天到了，树上的叶子慢慢变黄。
sentences.en: Autumn has come, and the leaves on the tree slowly turn yellow.

sentences.cn: 老人坐在长椅上晒太阳、看报纸。
sentences.en: An old man sits on the bench, basking in the sun and reading the paper.

sentences.cn: 我们走累了，就在长椅上坐下休息。
sentences.en: Tired from walking, we sat down on the bench to rest.

sentences.cn: 春天，公园里的花都开了。
sentences.en: In spring, the flowers in the park are all in bloom.

sentences.cn: 她低下头闻了闻路边的花。
sentences.en: She bent down and smelled the flowers by the path.

sentences.cn: 孩子们在草地上追着球跑。
sentences.en: The children chase a ball across the lawn.

sentences.cn: 周末我们在草地上铺了垫子野餐。
sentences.en: On the weekend we spread a mat on the lawn for a picnic.

sentences.cn: 池塘里有几条红色的小鱼。
sentences.en: There are a few little red fish in the pond.

sentences.cn: 几只鸭子在池塘里游来游去。
sentences.en: A few ducks paddle around in the pond.

sentences.cn: 小孩从滑梯上笑着滑了下来。
sentences.en: The child slid down the slide laughing.

sentences.cn: 玩滑梯的时候要一个一个排队。
sentences.en: When playing on the slide, take turns in line.

sentences.cn: 爸爸在后面轻轻地推着秋千。
sentences.en: Dad gently pushes the swing from behind.

sentences.cn: 她坐在秋千上，越荡越高。
sentences.en: Sitting on the swing, she goes higher and higher.

sentences.cn: 广场中间的喷泉喷得很高。
sentences.en: The fountain in the middle of the square sprays high.

sentences.cn: 到了晚上，喷泉旁边亮起了彩灯。
sentences.en: At night, colored lights come on beside the fountain.

sentences.cn: 我们走过小桥，来到河的另一边。
sentences.en: We crossed the small bridge to the other side of the river.

sentences.cn: 小桥下面的水又清又浅。
sentences.en: The water under the small bridge is clear and shallow.

sentences.cn: 下雨的时候，我们躲进凉亭里。
sentences.en: When it rained, we took shelter in the pavilion.

sentences.cn: 几位老人在凉亭里下棋、聊天。
sentences.en: A few old people play chess and chat in the pavilion.

topics.titleEn: Ten Types of Things at the Beach

sentences.cn: 海边的沙子被太阳晒得热热的。
sentences.en: The sand at the beach is hot from the sun.

sentences.cn: 我光着脚踩在软软的沙子上。
sentences.en: I walk barefoot on the soft sand.

sentences.cn: 我们在沙滩上捡了很多漂亮的贝壳。
sentences.en: We picked up many pretty seashells on the beach.

sentences.cn: 她把贝壳贴在耳边，好像能听到海。
sentences.en: She held the seashell to her ear as if she could hear the sea.

sentences.cn: 海浪一次又一次地打在脚上。
sentences.en: The waves hit our feet again and again.

sentences.cn: 今天风大，海浪比平时高。
sentences.en: The wind is strong today, and the waves are higher than usual.

sentences.cn: 中午太阳很大，我们躲在太阳伞下。
sentences.en: The noon sun is strong, so we hide under the beach umbrella.

sentences.cn: 爸爸在沙滩上撑起一把太阳伞。
sentences.en: Dad put up a beach umbrella on the sand.

sentences.cn: 小孩套着游泳圈在浅水里玩。
sentences.en: The child plays in the shallow water with a swim ring on.

sentences.cn: 下水前，妈妈给他吹好了游泳圈。
sentences.en: Before going in, Mom blew up the swim ring for him.

sentences.cn: 我们用湿沙子堆了一个大沙堡。
sentences.en: We built a big sandcastle out of wet sand.

sentences.cn: 一个海浪打过来，沙堡就塌了。
sentences.en: A wave came in and the sandcastle collapsed.

sentences.cn: 一只小螃蟹横着爬进了石头缝里。
sentences.en: A little crab scuttled sideways into a gap in the rocks.

sentences.cn: 退潮以后，沙滩上能看到很多螃蟹。
sentences.en: After the tide goes out, you can see many crabs on the beach.

sentences.cn: 我们在浅水里发现了一只红色的海星。
sentences.en: We found a red starfish in the shallow water.

sentences.cn: 海星有五只脚，慢慢地贴着石头爬。
sentences.en: A starfish has five arms and crawls slowly along the rocks.

sentences.cn: 下海之前，她先换上了泳衣。
sentences.en: Before going into the sea, she changed into her swimsuit.

sentences.cn: 太阳一晒，湿泳衣很快就干了。
sentences.en: In the sun, the wet swimsuit dried quickly.

sentences.cn: 对不起，我来晚了。
sentences.en: Sorry, I'm late.

sentences.cn: 对不起，这是我的问题。
sentences.en: Sorry, this is my problem.

sentences.cn: 不好意思，请问洗手间在哪里？
sentences.en: Excuse me, where is the restroom?

sentences.cn: 不好意思，我没听清楚。
sentences.en: Sorry, I didn't hear you clearly.

sentences.cn: 抱歉，我今天不能去了。
sentences.en: Apologies, I can't make it today.

sentences.cn: 很抱歉给你添了麻烦。
sentences.en: I'm sorry for causing you trouble.

sentences.cn: 真不好意思，让你等这么久。
sentences.en: I'm really sorry to make you wait so long.

sentences.cn: 真不好意思，我忘了带钱包。
sentences.en: I'm really sorry, I forgot my wallet.

sentences.cn: 这件事是我的错。
sentences.en: This whole thing is my fault.

sentences.cn: 是我的错，我不该迟到。
sentences.en: It's my fault, I shouldn't have been late.

items.pinyin: wǒ bú shì gù yì de

sentences.cn: 我不是故意的，请别生气。
sentences.en: I didn't mean to, please don't be angry.

sentences.cn: 撞到你了，我不是故意的。
sentences.en: I bumped into you, I didn't mean to.

sentences.cn: 请原谅我，我不会再犯了。
sentences.en: Please forgive me, I won't do it again.

sentences.cn: 我错了，请原谅我。
sentences.en: I was wrong, please forgive me.

sentences.cn: 不好意思，让你久等了。
sentences.en: Sorry, I kept you waiting.

sentences.cn: 路上堵车，让你久等了。
sentences.en: There was traffic, sorry to keep you waiting.

items.english: excuse me / sorry to bother you

sentences.en: Excuse me, what time is it now?

sentences.cn: 打扰一下，我可以进来吗？
sentences.en: Sorry to bother you, may I come in?

items.english: I'll be more careful next time

topics.titleEn: Ten Good Wishes and Social Phrases

sentences.cn: 祝你一路顺风！
sentences.en: Have a nice trip!

sentences.cn: 明天你就要走了，一路顺风。
sentences.en: You're leaving tomorrow — have a nice trip.

sentences.cn: 我们以后一定要保持联系。
sentences.en: We should definitely keep in touch from now on.

sentences.cn: 你搬走以后，我们还是保持联系吧。
sentences.en: After you move away, let's still keep in touch.

sentences.cn: 新年快乐，万事如意！
sentences.en: Happy new year, may all go well!

sentences.cn: 我给爸妈打电话说新年快乐。
sentences.en: I called my parents to say happy new year.

sentences.cn: 祝你早日康复！
sentences.en: I wish you a speedy recovery!

sentences.cn: 听说你病了，早日康复。
sentences.en: I heard you're sick — get well soon.

sentences.cn: 明天考试，祝你好运！
sentences.en: Exam tomorrow — good luck!

sentences.cn: 祝你好运，我相信你可以的。
sentences.en: Good luck, I believe you can do it.

sentences.cn: 恭喜你找到了新工作！
sentences.en: Congratulations on your new job!

sentences.cn: 听说你结婚了，恭喜你！
sentences.en: I heard you got married — congratulations!

sentences.cn: 生日快乐，这是给你的礼物。
sentences.en: Happy birthday, here's a gift for you.

sentences.cn: 我们一起唱生日快乐歌吧。
sentences.en: Let's sing the happy birthday song together.

sentences.cn: 假期玩得开心！
sentences.en: Have fun on your holiday!

sentences.cn: 你们去旅行，玩得开心。
sentences.en: You're off traveling — have fun.

sentences.cn: 祝你一切顺利。
sentences.en: May everything go smoothly for you.

sentences.cn: 希望你的新工作一切顺利。
sentences.en: I hope everything goes smoothly at your new job.

sentences.cn: 周末愉快，好好休息！
sentences.en: Have a nice weekend, get some good rest!

sentences.cn: 下班了，祝大家周末愉快。
sentences.en: Off work now — wishing everyone a nice weekend.
